report.summary: Standup v2 Apr 4: 7 agent runs since v1 across all 6 types. Build added 2 new guides (Onchain Order Books/CLOBs, Crypto Prime Brokerage). Publish promoted 5 pages (perpetual futures, pump.fun, restaking, soneium, stablecoin comparison). Community drafted tweets #490-494 + newsletter v51. Design polished both new guides with OG images + UX fixes. 678 published slugs, 7 in queue, 122 uncommitted files. Deploy debt at 34th escalation — production frozen since Apr 2.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v1 → v2: 7 agent runs — build×1, publish×1, community×1, design×1, eod×1, standup×1 (prior) + this run. Full cycle rotation completed.

BUILD OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Onchain Order Books & CLOBs (3,000+ words, dYdX v4, Sei, Orderly, Hyperliquid 200K+ daily traders) and Crypto Prime Brokerage (2,800+ words, FalconX, Coinbase Prime, Hidden Road $1.25B acquisition, Anchorage Digital). Both with Article + FAQPage + BreadcrumbList structured data.

PUBLISH OUTPUT: 5 pages promoted from queue → PUBLISHED_PAGES: perpetual-futures-guide, pump-fun-memecoins, restaking-eigenlayer, soneium-guide, stablecoin-comparison. QA passed (H1, breadcrumbs, valid TSX). 7 pages remain in queue.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT: 5 tweets drafted (#490-494) covering onchain CLOBs, prime brokerage ($1.25B Hidden Road), 685-page milestone, ZK coprocessors, weekend signal roundup. Newsletter v51 'The Institutions Are Here'. 2 new social card SVGs. Content calendar through Jun 27.

DESIGN OUTPUT: UX audit on both new guides — Prime Brokerage got breadcrumbs, clickable TOC, section IDs, responsive typography, mobile table scroll, accessibility fixes. 2 OG images created (order book viz + institutional architecture diagram).
CONTENT PIPELINE: 678 published slugs (confirmed from file), 7 in queue. 114 learn dirs in Degen0x staging. 313 learn pages in cryptodegen. 8+ new guides built since last deploy awaiting commit.
MARKET: BTC ~$66,650 (stable). F&G 9 (Extreme Fear, 5+ days). Stablecoins $316B ATH. Iran war headlines suppressing risk. Thin Saturday liquidity.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel, alternative.me. Market data from web search. No live traffic delta available.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v1: 7 agent runs — build (Onchain CLOBs + Prime Brokerage), publish (5 pages promoted), community (tweets + newsletter + social cards), design (UX audit + OG images), eod (QA cycle-close), standup (this run).
TODAY'S TOTAL: 8 agent runs — standup×2 ($90), build×1 ($233), publish×1 ($55), community×1 ($41), design×1 ($60), eod×1 ($63). Total human-equiv: $542.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (34TH ESCALATION): Deploy debt CRITICAL++. 122 uncommitted files. Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2 (3 days). 678 published slugs in registry vs what's live. 8+ new guides trapped behind uncommitted code. Publish agent promoted 5 more pages today but they can't go live without deploy. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — 8+ GUIDES AWAITING DEPLOY: Jupiter DEX, Crypto KYC, ZK Coprocessors, Polygon AggLayer, Glamsterdam, Restaking Wars, Onchain CLOBs, Crypto Prime Brokerage. All built with full SEO but unreachable by users.

P2 — QUEUE STATUS: 7 pages remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE (monad-guide, symbiotic-restaking, token-vesting-explained, validator-staking-guide, zero-knowledge-proofs, zksync-era-guide, zora-attention-markets-guide-2026). 2 have no page.tsx (monad, zora).
P3 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom slugs (missing page.tsx), 141 TS errors in 4 files (non-blocking), 0/6 API rate limiting, 1/6 routes with fallback data. defi-yields route most fragile.
P4 — CARRY-OVER: mev-guide and solana-vs-ethereum warn status. defi-yields API hardening deferred.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 34TH ESCALATION): 3 days of agent output trapped. 122 uncommitted files, 678 published slugs, 8+ new guides covering hot narratives (institutional infra, onchain CLOBs, ZK, compliance). Content freshness decaying hourly. Today's publish batch (5 pages) is invisible without deploy. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — CLEAR REMAINING QUEUE (7 PAGES): 5 of 7 queue pages have valid page.tsx (symbiotic-restaking, token-vesting, validator-staking, zero-knowledge-proofs, zksync-era). Promote in next publish cycle. Fix or scaffold monad-guide and zora page.tsx before promoting those 2.

PRIORITY 3 — INSTITUTIONAL NARRATIVE MOMENTUM: Onchain CLOBs (Hyperliquid 200K+ daily traders) and Prime Brokerage ($1.25B Hidden Road) guides are perfectly timed for the institutional infrastructure narrative during extreme fear. Deploy would let these capture organic search while the topic is hot.
